entry.title: Entry #1277 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE of Sealed Letter Motion to Compel and related exhibits [ECF Doc. 1369] served on All Plaintiffs and Open AI Defendants on March 3, 2026. Service was made by E-mail. Document filed by Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation. Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Najemy, Laura) (Entered: 03/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1276 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: LETTER MOTION to Compel The New York Times Company to Produce Subscriber Data Metrics and Survey Instruments and Accompanying Exhibits addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Laura B. Najemy dated March 3, 2026. Document filed by Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A - NYT Q4 2022 Earning Results, # 2 Exhibit B - NYT Q4 2025 Earning Results, # 3 Exhibit C - Excerpt of the 30(b)(6) deposition transcript of Hannah Yang taken on February 27, 2026, # 4 Exhibit D - NYT Supp. Resp. to MSFT ROG No. 15, # 5 Exhibit E - Resps. to MSFT RFP Nos. 48 and 56, # 6 Exhibit F - Resps. to MSFT RFP Set 2 Nos. 69-110, # 7 Exhibit G - Resps. to MSFT RFP Set 4 Nos. 139-235, # 8 Exhibit H - Resps. to MSFT RFP Set 6 Nos. 259-282, # 9 Exhibit I - Excerpt of the deposition transcript of A.G. Sulzberger taken on February 13, 2026,, # 10 Exhibit J - Excerpt of the deposition transcript of Sonia Yamada taken on January 22, 2026, # 11 Exhibit K - Email correspondence, # 12 Exhibit L - Excerpt of the deposition transcript of William Bardeen taken on February 24, 2026, # 13 Exhibit M - Excerpt of the deposition transcript of Barrett Sheridan taken on September 17, 2025, # 14 Exhibit N - Excerpt of the 30(b)(1) deposition transcript of Hannah Yang taken on February 27, 2026)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Najemy, Laura) (Entered: 03/03/2026)
